zero_slop_policy.statement: NO AI SLOP ALLOWED AT ALL - ZERO TOLERANCE TO SLOP AND HALLUCINATIONS
zero_slop_policy.strict_compliance: Mandatory. Every claim must be project-specific, evidence-backed, trace-linked, reviewer-challenged, and free of unsupported invention.
zero_slop_policy.missing_evidence_rule: If evidence is missing, mark it as an assumption, risk, open question, or failure.

title: ai-extract logging redaction not yet implemented
scope: Slice-4 Sage Extraction: error-path logs in apps/ai-extract/app/main.py + extractors/* may serialize the full document_text payload when an exception is raised. No PII redaction layer is wired into the structlog/Pino pipeline.
linked_threat: ARC-005 §2.4 T-AI-7 (inference-side data leak: document plaintext logged in error path). Original severity: medium.
rationale: v0 operates on synthetic data only per HD-008 — there is no real PII or PHI that could leak via logs. Production posture would require: (a) DLP scan on log lines, (b) explicit field-level redaction of document_text/extracted_facts before serialization, (c) log retention with same WORM discipline as audit_log. Queued as patch bead TB-WC-2026-PATCH-LOGREDACT per slice-ralph-sweep-record.json §patch_beads_queued.
owner: claude-orchestrator (delivery owner) on behalf of construction-bead persona + Privacy Juror persona
approver: client_owner via HD-008 default-accept (synthetic-data-only at v0)
approval_basis: HD-008 explicitly accepts the synthetic-data-only constraint at v0, which eliminates the PII/PHI leakage scenario. Production-posture transition (production_surface=true) reactivates this requirement automatically.
approval_date: 2026-04-26 (HD-008 default-accept at checkpoint-#1) / 2026-05-03 (explicit waiver record per Final Hawkeye F-FN-04)
expiry: Before any of: (a) production_surface=true transition, (b) loading real PII or PHI into the system, (c) the synthetic-only constraint per HD-008 being amended.
reactivation_trigger: Any of: (a) production_surface flag flips true, (b) real PII or PHI in any extraction pipeline input, (c) HD-008 amended.
residual_risk: low at v0 (synthetic data; no PII/PHI to leak); medium at any production posture without redaction layer.

trace.implementing_change: Slice-4 follow-up: structlog redaction processor over (document_text, extracted_facts.value, source_excerpt) fields + Pino redact configuration on the api side + structured-output-only logging discipline (no print()/console.log of payload bodies).
